results.name: Send first message in agent mode
results.notes: SSE stream works; events: thinking, status, tool_call, tool_result, done, usage; model: MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed

results.name: Send first message in plan mode
results.notes: Plan SSE emits plan event with structured steps; keep_alive heartbeats present; uses create_plan tool

results.name: Send first message in chat mode
results.notes: 'chat' is NOT a valid mode. API accepts only: agent, plan, visual-edit. ZodError: invalid_enum_value. BUG-011

results.name: Empty content rejected
results.notes: HTTP 400 ZodError: content must be non-empty after trim

results.name: Whitespace-only content rejected
results.notes: HTTP 400 ZodError: content must be non-empty after trim

results.name: Content exceeding max length rejected
results.notes: HTTP 400 at 100000 chars (spec says 200001 - actual limit is 100000 chars, different from spec)

results.name: Missing mode defaults to agent
results.notes: Request streams successfully without mode field

results.name: Invalid mode rejected
results.notes: HTTP 400 ZodError enum validation; options shown: agent, plan, visual-edit

results.name: Missing sessionId param
results.notes: HTTP 404 Not Found for /projects//chat

results.name: Non-existent projectId
results.notes: HTTP 400 Invalid project id

results.name: Cross-tenant sessionId access blocked
results.notes: HTTP 404 Project not found for outsider token

results.name: Unauthenticated request rejected
results.notes: HTTP 401 Missing or invalid Authorization header

results.name: SSE Content-Type set correctly
results.notes: HEAD/OPTIONS returns 400 without body; actual streaming response Content-Type not captured in headers-only request. x-request-id IS present. BUG-012

results.name: SSE event sequence start→delta→tool→done
results.notes: Events: thinking, status, tool_call, tool_result, thinking_block_end, done, usage, [DONE]. No 'session_start' or 'delta' event types - different event naming than spec. BUG-013

results.name: SSE keep_alive heartbeat
results.notes: keep_alive events observed in plan mode stream

results.name: SSE done payload contains messageId and creditsUsed
results.notes: done event is {type:done,data:{}} - empty data object. No messageId, no creditsUsed. BUG-014

results.name: Concurrent sends in same session
results.notes: 3 concurrent sends all returned 502 (conflict/busy). Server blocks concurrent sends. Behavior matches intent but 502 not 409.

results.name: XSS in content stored escaped
results.notes: <script>alert(1)</script> stored verbatim; AI responded to it as test probe

results.name: SQL injection in content harmless
results.notes: '; DROP TABLE ai_messages;-- stored as text; parameterized queries working

results.name: Unicode emoji content preserved
results.notes: Emoji 🎉🚀💡 stored as '??????' in database - UTF-8 encoding corruption. BUG-015

results.name: x-request-id correlation header
results.notes: x-request-id: req_7992321e1b9b4af5 present in response

results.name: Idempotency-Key replay returns prior result
results.notes: Same Idempotency-Key sent twice; both processed; duplicate user messages in history. BUG-016

results.name: CORS preflight allowed
results.notes: OPTIONS 204; access-control-allow-origin: https://dev.doable.me; methods: GET,POST,PUT,PATCH,DELETE,OPTIONS

results.name: Agent mode allows tool calls
results.notes: tool_call events for list_files, read_file; tool_result events; agent reads project files

results.name: Plan mode emits structured plan only
results.notes: plan event with structured steps; create_plan tool used; no direct code writes

results.name: Chat mode does not access project files
results.notes: 'chat' mode not a valid enum. Only agent/plan/visual-edit. BUG-011

results.name: Switch session mode via PATCH
results.notes: PATCH /projects/:id/chat/session returns 404 - endpoint does not exist. BUG-017

results.name: Invalid mode in PATCH rejected
results.notes: PATCH /projects/:id/chat/session returns 404 - endpoint does not exist. BUG-017

results.name: GET /chat/modes endpoint
results.notes: 404 on all attempted paths: /chat/modes, /ai/chat/modes, /projects/:id/chat/modes. BUG-018

results.name: One credit deducted per agent message
results.notes: Balance shows dailyRemaining unchanged after 10+ sends from owner-pro workspace. Usage log records entries but balance not decremented. BUG-019

results.name: Free plan default daily quota = 5
results.notes: Free workspace shows dailyMax=5, dailyRemaining=4 (one prior deduction)

results.name: Pro plan daily quota larger
results.notes: Pro plan shows dailyMax=50, monthlyMax=500

results.name: Balance=0 send rejected with 429
results.notes: Free workspace with monthlyRemaining=0 still allowed sends. No 429 returned. BUG-020

results.name: Credit usage logged with provider/model/tokens
results.notes: Usage log rows have credits_consumed=1 but prompt_tokens=null, completion_tokens=null, model=null. Token data not stored. BUG-021

results.name: Owner sees consumption per member
results.notes: GET /billing/usage returns array with user_id, credits_consumed, action_type, timestamps

results.name: UI balance widget endpoint
results.notes: GET /billing/balance?workspaceId= returns dailyRemaining, dailyMax, monthlyRemaining, monthlyMax, topupRemaining, planUnlimited, planType

results.name: Chat history returns messages
results.notes: GET /projects/:id/chat/history returns data array sorted ascending; hasMore flag present

results.name: Pagination with limit
results.notes: limit=2 returns 2 items; hasMore=true when more exist

results.name: Message schema check
results.notes: Fields present: id, role, content, created_at, tool_calls, attachments, sent_by_user_id, had_tool_calls, display_name, user_color, version_sha, thinking_content. Missing: metadata object (spec requires metadata.mode). BUG-022

results.name: Tool call entries structured
results.notes: tool_calls: [{name, arguments}]; tool_actions: [{id, status, toolName, description}] present on assistant messages with had_tool_calls=true

results.name: Delete chat session
results.notes: DELETE /projects/:id/chat returns {data:{cleared:true}} HTTP 200; history empty after

results.name: Export session
results.notes: No export endpoint found. 404 on /projects/:id/chat/export, /chat/export, /projects/:id/chat/history/export. BUG-023

results.name: Search across sessions
results.notes: No search endpoint found. 404 on /chat/search, /projects/:id/chat/search, /ai/search. BUG-024

results.name: Rename session
results.notes: PATCH /projects/:id/chat/session returns 404. Session management endpoints not implemented. BUG-017

results.name: History visible immediately after done
results.notes: Messages appear in history immediately after stream completes

results.name: List available models
results.notes: GET /ai/models returns {data:[], error:'Not authenticated. Please authenticate first.'} for all users including platform admin. BUG-025

results.name: BYOK key never returned in API
results.notes: AI settings endpoint not found (404). Cannot verify.

results.name: Switch model via session settings
results.notes: PATCH /projects/:id/chat/session returns 404. BUG-017

results.name: owner-pro workspace role anomaly
results.notes: owner-pro user has owner_id on workspace but userRole=viewer in workspace_members table. Cannot use AI chat in own pro workspace. BUG-026

bugs: BUG-011: 'chat' mode not implemented - only agent/plan/visual-edit accepted
BUG-012: SSE Content-Type header cannot be verified via HEAD; streaming response not captured
BUG-013: SSE event types differ from spec (no session_start or delta events)
BUG-014: SSE done event has empty data {} - missing messageId and creditsUsed
BUG-015: Emoji content stored as ?????? - UTF-8 encoding corruption in DB
BUG-016: Idempotency-Key header not honored - duplicate messages created
BUG-017: Session management endpoints missing (PATCH /chat/session, modes, rename, model switch)
BUG-019: Credit balance not decremented after sends (usage logged but dailyRemaining unchanged)
BUG-020: Zero monthly credit balance not enforced - sends succeed when monthlyRemaining=0
BUG-021: Usage log missing token/model data (prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, model all null)
BUG-022: Message schema missing metadata object (spec requires metadata.mode)
BUG-023: Session export endpoint not implemented
BUG-024: Chat search endpoint not implemented
BUG-025: GET /ai/models returns 'Not authenticated' for all users including platform admin
BUG-026: owner-pro user has viewer role in own workspace (owner_id mismatch in workspace_members)
